title: DP Checklist
heading: Data Processing (DP) QA Checklist
description: Standard checklist items for QAing Data Processing tables and banners.

categories.title: Overall
items: All tables in specs are accounted for in the tables file vs DA.
If specific tables are needed for each banner, confirm correct tables are being run for each banner.
Tables are in the correct order (based on DA).
Final Data in R matches Excel Tabs export.
Any custom DVs are built correctly.

categories.title: Each Table
items: Table title matches specs and spelled correctly.
Base description matches specs and spelled correctly.
All categories are showing in table as per specs and spelled correctly.
Check that all stubs are present, in the correct order, and spelled correctly.
For single-punch variables, make sure that data sums to total.
For multi-punch variables, make sure that data sums to more than total.
For numerics, make sure the correct calculations are included (and make sense - e.g., does the mean seem too high or low?).
Nets created as per specs and spelled correctly.
Bases on tables are matching specs based on counts (e.g., based to total vs based to subset).
Weighting is applied or not applied correctly.
Summary Tables are pulling in the correct rows (e.g., Summary of TB should only be pulling in TB).

categories.title: Banners & Stat Testing
items: Banner labels match specs and are spelled correctly.
Banner cell values checked against spec/counts.
Stat testing letters line up with the correct banner cell (don't include Total cell).
Stat testing columns match specs.
Confirm stat testing requested makes sense with the columns and banner set-up.

categories.title: Edge Cases
items: Are there labels/specs/tables that don't make sense that we would want to go back to the team for clarification?
If there are tables or banner cells that use non-completes, make sure all the rest of the tables/banner cells are correctly filtered to Completes.
Do the Table Titles make sense with Base Descriptions?
This is in case tables were copied in set-up but titles or bases not updated.
Remember that Rapid Choice and IIM Bases may not match the base spec because cleaning is done in data processing.
